case_title: STEVEN BRUCE VS. CHLOE REED DVM ET AL

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO APR-12-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF APR-05-2023 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-12-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-12-2023 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF STEVEN BRUCE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHLOE REED DVM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MISSION PET HOSPITAL IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY CURTIS PRESS, OWNER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLIVA HUSING; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NO AMOUNT GIVEN) SERVED FEB-06-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MISSION PET HOSPITAL (MPH)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRUCE, STEVEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT REED DVM, CHLOE MISSION PET HOSPITAL (MPH) GLAD TO HEAR YOUR DOG IS OK! YOU SIGNED THE GENERAL TREATMENT FORM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. [SUBMITTED ON SC-150 FORM <REQUEST TO POSTPONE>] FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRUCE, STEVEN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO SERVICE FEE AMOUNT GIVEN. SERVED FEB-08-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT REED DVM, CHLOE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT MISSION PET HOSPITAL (MPH)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,948.00 FILED BY BRUCE, STEVEN AS TO DEFENDANT REED DVM, CHLOE MISSION PET HOSPITAL (MPH) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-05-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-12-2023 - JUDGMENT.
